metadata.description: Evaluation benchmarks for testing stock market QA systems

factual.question: What was the closing price on the most recent trading day in the dataset?
What was the highest price reached in the last 30 days of data?
What was the average trading volume over the last 10 trading days?
What was the price range (high minus low) on the most recent trading day?

temporal.question: Did the stock price increase or decrease over the last week of data?
What was the percentage change from the opening price to closing price on the most recent day?
How many consecutive days did the stock close higher in the last 10 days of data?

comparative.question: Was the trading volume on the most recent day higher or lower than the 10-day average?
Compare the average closing price of the first 7 days vs the last 7 days in the dataset - which period had higher prices?
Is the most recent closing price higher or lower than it was 30 days ago?

factual.question: What was the closing price on the most recent trading day in the dataset?
What was the lowest price in the last 30 days of data?
What was the trading volume on the most recent trading day?

temporal.question: Compare the opening and closing prices on the most recent day - did it go up or down?
What is the trend over the last 5 trading days - generally increasing or decreasing?
What was the biggest single-day percentage gain in the last 30 days?

comparative.question: Which was higher: the highest price in the last 7 days or the highest price in the previous 7 days?
Compare the volatility (high-low range) of the most recent 5 days vs the previous 5 days

factual.question: What was the closing price on the most recent trading day in the dataset?
What was the average closing price over the last 7 trading days?
What was the trading volume on the most recent trading day?

temporal.question: What was the largest single-day price increase in the last 30 days?
Is the most recent closing price higher or lower than 7 days ago?
How many days in the last 14 did the stock close in the green (closing higher than opening)?

comparative.question: Was the price more volatile (larger daily ranges) in the first 15 days or last 15 days of the dataset?
Compare average daily volume: last 10 days vs previous 10 days - which was higher?

factual.question: What was the closing price on the most recent trading day in the dataset?
What was the highest and lowest price in the entire dataset?

temporal.question: What was the 7-day moving average of the closing price as of the most recent day?
Did the stock have more up days or down days in the last 20 trading days?

comparative.question: What percentage gain or loss occurred from the first day to the last day in the dataset?

factual.question: What was the closing price on the most recent trading day in the dataset?
What was the median closing price over the last 30 days?

temporal.question: What was the longest streak of consecutive up days in the last 30 days?
Is the current price trending above or below the 10-day average?

comparative.question: Which week was better: the most recent 5 trading days or the previous 5 trading days?

factual_accuracy.description: Percentage of factual questions answered correctly

temporal_accuracy.description: Ability to handle time-series analysis and trends

comparative_accuracy.description: Ability to make comparisons between different time periods or values

hallucination_rate.description: Percentage of answers containing fabricated information not present in the data
hallucination_rate.scoring: Count instances where model cites data not in context

calculation_accuracy.description: Correctness of mathematical calculations when required
calculation_accuracy.scoring: Binary - 1 for correct calculation, 0 for incorrect
